SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-18-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 10:21am
Judge Pro Tem Donald Drummond, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Ike S. Shehadeh, DBA Ike's Place appears through Ali Faritous and Jill Mizono. Respondent, Scarlett Anne Black appears in pro per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Drummond.

10:36am

Matter is dismissed, parties have settled.
